title: Gnome Dragoon scales from Gnome cards in hand

card.rawText: For every card in your hand with "Gnome" in its name, add: Atk Dice Rolls: +1. Modifier: +1.

effect.value: Atk Dice Rolls +1 and Modifier +1 per Gnome card

plan.title: Gnome Dragoon scales from Gnome cards in hand
plan.summary: Put one Gnome card in hand while Gnome Dragoon is primary and verify the per-Gnome attack dice and modifier bonuses apply once.

notes: Set Gnome Dragoon as player_1 primary and keep one Gnome card in player_1 hand for the name-count scaling effect.

steps: Set Gnome Dragoon as player_1 primary creature.
Keep one Gnome card in player_1 hand.
Read Gnome Dragoon's effective attack dice and modifier.

expectedAssertions.label: One Gnome in hand adds one attack die
One Gnome in hand adds one modifier

manualVerification: Confirm each additional Gnome-named card in hand adds one Atk Dice Roll and one Modifier.
riskNotes: Uses the same dynamic hand-name count layer as the Gen 1 Gnome fixture, with Gnome Dragoon's printed 3 Atk Dice and +1 Modifier baseline.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
